title: Darrick's VWP Villager Pack
description: Replaces renamed Villagers with the V.W.P. girls!
body:
My second ever serious project release!\
This resource pack replaces renamed Villagers into girls from [Virtual Witch Phenomenon](https://kamitsubaki.jp/artist/v-w-p/)!\
**For Minecraft versions 1.19.4 and above.**

## 
## ![Optifine Required](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4454592095a26f097ff9d9b0054be37118585a52.png)
**This resource pack requires Optifine to work!**\
Check the following settings:\
Video Settings > Quality > Custom Entity Models > ON\
Video Settings > Quality > Random Entity > ON\
[![optifine download](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df47e5c78731e258805959ded83b7b8564f195c7.png)](https://optifine.net/downloads)

## 
## ![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6985b8d436e1d78880bdba69c223eb1e81d7797c.png)


</details>

Version Alpha 0.1\
Simply use a nametag to rename a Villager into "KAF", "RIM", "Isekaijoucho" or "KOKO" (without the quotation mark)!\
There are many variants of KAF, RIM and Joucho! One for each biome!
![KAF Biome Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26cfa4eba44d3ebddc304baba0b2b4380a723030.png)
![RIM Biome Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/717a204bd6aa906d1f69a5f19edbd51c5546799c.png)
![Nyonyo Biome Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a877680d49067eaba8b9fece2af14eb7f0c996f2.png)
![Koko Biome Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/537b98214354e4037cca21b49c57849461d932cd.png)

And there is one of each profession!
![KAF Profession Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ee81f41edafb3f108a24553c5050df839f67fad.png)

NEW!
Floating model for all of them! They will have a floatie when trying to swim!
![Floatie Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caf56245a5b4332ce3a45b5d861d962f3e20fff1.png)

## 
## **DEV ROADMAP**
Currently, we're on version Alpha 0.3. Everything is still in testing phase, and there's only KAF, RIM, Joucho and KOKO! I named this a VWP pack for a reason!\
So, here's all the features I planned for future updates

1. Harusaruhi Model, Textures
2. Better animations, if I learn how to


**If you want to help me develop this pack, please join the [Kamitsubaki English Fan Community](https://discord.gg/tGd7BevTJ5) and look for a forum channel called Darrick's VWP Minecraft Resource Pack!**\
I could always use some help with ideas and voicelines.
